# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_galleryimage (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gallery_name` (String) The name of the Shared Image Gallery in which the Image Definition is to be created.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the gallery Image Definition to be created or updated. The allowed characters are alphabets and numbers with dots, dashes, and periods allowed in the middle. The maximum length is 80 characters.
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group.

### Optional

- `architecture` (String) This property allows you to specify the hardware architecture of the Virtual Machines. Arm64 is only supported with Hyper V Version 2.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of this gallery Image Definition resource. This property is updatable.
- `disallowed` (String) Disallowed parameter values.
- `end_of_life_date` (String) The end of life date of the gallery Image Definition. This property can be used for decommissioning purposes. This property is updatable. Format should be according to ISO-8601, for instance "2019-06-26".
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `eula` (String) The Eula agreement for the gallery Image Definition.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `features` (String) A list of gallery image features.
- `hypervgeneration` (String) This property allows you to specify the Hyper V Version of the Virtual Machines.
- `identifier` (String) Image identifier. Required when creating.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `location` (String) Resource location.
- `os_state` (String) The allowed values for OS State are `generalized`. Required when creating.
- `os_type` (String) This property allows you to specify the type of the OS that is included in the disk when creating a VM from a managed image. Required when creating.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `privacy_statement_uri` (String) The privacy statement uri.
- `purchase_plan` (String) Purchase plan.
- `recommended` (String) Recommended parameter values.
- `release_note_uri` (String) The release note uri.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the GalleryImage. Use `present` to create or update an GalleryImage and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
